{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Skysworn stranger's eyes
| introduced = Ghostwater
}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Skysworn stranger's eyes]] turn black with red irises.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c1">''Ghostwater'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
